# viettelidc_vks_subnet (Data Source)

Data source for retrieving details of a single VKS Cluster Subnet.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cluster_id` (String)
- `subnet_id` (String)

### Read-Only

- `cidr_block` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `is_public_zone` (Boolean)
- `name` (String)
